zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Franceis II於1246年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，他的父親John de Franceis I22歲，母親Margaret Scolice18歲。他於1265年與Agnes De Tyckenhall在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1287年在英國德比夏爾奧斯馬斯頓享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Franceis II于1246年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，他的父亲John de Franceis I22岁，母亲Margaret Scolice18岁。他于1265年与Agnes De Tyckenhall在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1287年在英国德比夏爾奧斯馬斯頓享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Franceis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Francis  .

variants.name: Francis
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Franceis, modern French François, from Latin Franciscus, originally ‘Frank’, though later used to denote a Frenchman. The personal name owed much of its popularity during the Middle Ages to the fame of Saint Francis of Assisi (1181–1226), whose baptismal name was actually Giovanni but who was nicknamed Francisco because his father was absent in France at the time of his birth. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Francesco and Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Franc , and also their derivatives, e.g. Croatian Francišković (see Francisco 4).
English: ethnic name from the Old French adjective Franceis ‘French’ (see 1 above).
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, or an adoption of the non-Jewish surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Franceis II was born in 1246, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Franceis I, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Scolice, was 18. He married Agnes De Tyckenhall in 1265, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1287, in Osmaston, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Franceis II est né en 1246, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Franceis I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Scolice, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes De Tyckenhall en 1265, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1287, à Osmaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Franceis II 1246 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Franceis I 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Scolice 18. Er hat 1265 in Derbyshire, England Agnes De Tyckenhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1287 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Osmaston, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Franceis II è nato il nel 1246 nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Franceis I, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Scolice, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes De Tyckenhall nel 1265, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1287, nel Osmaston, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Franceis IIが1246年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Franceis Iは22歳，母Margaret Scoliceは18歳であった。1265年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでAgnes De Tyckenhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1287年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアオスマストンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Franceis II(이)가 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Franceis I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Scolice(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1265년 영국 더비실르에서 Agnes De Tyckenhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1287년 영국 더비실르 오스마스턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Franceis II nasceu em 1246, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Franceis I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Scolice, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes De Tyckenhall em 1265, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1287, em Osmaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Franceis II родился в 1246 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Franceis I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Scolice, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes De Tyckenhall в 1265 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1287 г. в местности осмастон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Franceis II nació en 1246, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Franceis I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Scolice, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnes De Tyckenhall en 1265, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1287, en Osmaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
